case_title: SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC VS. CHRISTY NEASLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY BANK (AVENUE) AS TO DEFENDANT NEASLEY, CHRISTY DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-26-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200009531) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECOND ROUND SUB, LLC ASSIGNEE OF COMENITY BANK (AVENUE)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100120043)
